# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Pod specification for our container that needs to interact with the Docker socket for CI/CD operations. The pod needs elevated permissions to build and push Docker images. This runs in our build cluster for automated deployments.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: ci-cd-builder
spec:
  containers:
  - name: builder
    image: docker:latest
    command: ["/bin/sh", "-c"]
    args:
    - |
      apk add --no-cache docker-cli &&
      docker version &&
      exec /bin/sh
    volumeMounts:
    - name: docker-socket
      mountPath: /var/run/docker.sock
    - name: docker-config
      mountPath: /root/.docker
    securityContext:
      runAsUser: 1000
      runAsGroup: 1000
      allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
      readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
      capabilities:
        drop:
        - ALL
  volumes:
  - name: docker-socket
    hostPath:
      path: /var/run/docker.sock
  - name: docker-config
    emptyDir: {}
  securityContext:
    runAsNonRoot: true
    runAsUser: 1000
    runAsGroup: 1000
    fsGroup: 1000
  automountServiceAccountToken: false
  hostNetwork: false
  hostPID: false
  hostIPC: false
